entity.label: Paltiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Deliverance of God, the prince of Issachar who assisted “to divide the land by inheritance” (Num. 34:26).

nodes.label: Paltiel
nodes.description: Deliverance of God, the prince of Issachar who assisted “to divide the land by inheritance” (Num. 34:26).

verses.text: And the prince of the tribe of the children of Issachar, Paltiel the son of Azzan.
